item.title: Boston Scientific Neuromodulation Corporation: Intracept Access Instruments, Description/REF: INTRACEPT ACCESS INSTRUMENTS- DRILL/RLV0035, INTRACEPT ACCESS INSTRUMENTS- DRILL EU/RLV0035-E Recall
item.product: Intracept Access Instruments, Description/REF: INTRACEPT ACCESS INSTRUMENTS- DRILL/RLV0035, INTRACEPT ACCESS INSTRUMENTS- DRILL EU/RLV0035-E
item.summary: Intraosseous nerve ablation system instruments may have sterile barrier breach of the outer tray seal, which may introduce a risk of sterility breach, and if breached could lead to severe infection. Product details: Intracept Access Instruments, Description/REF: INTRACEPT ACCESS INSTRUMENTS- DRILL/RLV0035, INTRACEPT ACCESS INSTRUMENTS- DRILL EU/RLV0035-EU, INTRACEPT ACCESS INSTRUMENTS- 2VB/RLV0045, INTRACEPT ACCESS INSTRUMENTS- 2VB EU/RLV0045-EU, INTRACEPT ACCESS INSTRUME...
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide - US Nationwide distribution including in the states of NJ, WI, MI, MN, AR, UT, OH, FL, CA, TX, PA, AZ, IN, LA, NE, OK, NY, MD, WY, CO, NC, IL, GA, WA, KS, AL, MO, VA, TN, KY, MS, MA, SC, OR, WV, MT, ID, SD, CT, NV, ND, NH, DE, NM, AK, IA, DC, HI, ME, VT, RI and the countries of Great Britain, Germany, United Arab Emirates.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
